_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description:
You can:
- own, manage and optimise budgets across digital, data and technology
- secure appropriate investment to deliver organisational strategy and priorities
- negotiate investments in shared technologies across the organisation and across government
Examples of leadership using this skill:
- prioritising competing demands for investment in people, infrastructure and innovation across digital, data and technology to maximise value
- identifying risk to critical services and influencing stakeholders to increase investment to ensure they are maintained
- balancing short-term tactical gains with longer-term strategies to ensure value now and in the future
reference_document_element_description: Ability to prioritize data governance investments across competing data domains and business units with limited resources and uneven organizational maturity.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-008 (DA, cosine: 0.512), LS-S-012 (LS, cosine: 0.508).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.580). Shared vocabulary: [across, competing, data, investments]. DDaT-only terms [appropriate, balancing, budgets, critical, deliver, demands] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, business, domains, governance, limited, maturity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.819, R=0.866). R exceeds P by 0.047 — the WIDAI KSA's 20 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 93 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance:
NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "You can:
- own, manage and optimise budgets across digital, data and technology" and "Ability to prioritize data governance investments across competing data domains" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 ≈ STS 0.580 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [across, competing, data, investments] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [across, competing, data, investments]. DDaT-only: [appropriate, balancing, budgets, critical, deliver, demands]. WIDAI-only: [ability, business, domains, governance, limited, maturity].
